name: python3-cmd2
title: python3-cmd2
description:
Enhanced Python cmd module - Python 3.x
Drop-in replacement adds several features for command-prompt tools, like
searchable and persistent command history, multi-line commands, input and
output redirections, integrated Python shell, testing helpers
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cmd2 because Enhanced Python cmd module - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cmd2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cmd2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cmd2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
